messages.message: ✅ APPROVED — Critic score 5/10 meets threshold. No challenge required.
🛑 STRATEGIC PAUSE — Critic score 5/10 is below threshold (9.5). Board deliberation required.

weaknesses.challenge: No A/B test data supports the proposed UX flow. Competitor analysis shows 3 alternatives with proven conversion funnels.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing market validation.

weaknesses.challenge: Gross margin assumptions exclude infrastructure amortization and support staffing.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing unit economics.

weaknesses.challenge: Onboarding flow has 6 steps. Industry data shows each step loses 15-20% of users.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing user retention.

messages.message: ⚠️ [SIGNIFICANT] Market Validation: No A/B test data supports the proposed UX flow. Competitor analysis shows 3 alternatives with proven conversion funnels.
⚠️ [SIGNIFICANT] Unit Economics: Gross margin assumptions exclude infrastructure amortization and support staffing.
⚠️ [SIGNIFICANT] User Retention: Onboarding flow has 6 steps. Industry data shows each step loses 15-20% of users.
🏛️ The board awaits the Commander's reasoning. Present your evidence or invoke Hard Override.
